snapshot.scope: Manual review binds public/documentation surfaces, control manifests, verifier code and shared executable schemas; automated gates execute current implementation evidence separately.

reviewers.task: Approved Pige app icon exact-hash packaged visual review
reviewers.independence: UI Design independently reviewed the exact thirty-path icon integration candidate read-only, including real packaged Finder presentation, platform export identity, builder bindings, Windows frame inventory, documentation boundaries and unchanged mobile/runtime claims. It returned ACCEPTED/CLEAR and made no edits during the final exact-hash review.

dimensions.summary: README introduces the approved mark at the product title, START_HERE routes icon work to the existing UI and Release owners, and the dedicated asset README owns source/export inventory without creating a broad branding document.

README, UI Prototype, asset inventory, electron-builder bindings and packageability assertions agree on the exact deep-teal circle and white-pigeon mark, platform-owned masks, desktop packaging, and future-ready but non-implemented mobile exports.

The icon is a presentation and release-resource integration with no Requirement, Exit, phase, acceptance-state or semantic-claim change; exact asset and packaged/source identities are bound by the current-only review and executable packageability selector.

Development gets one canonical master plus explicit macOS, Windows, iOS and Android export inventories, exact desktop builder paths, native Windows frame checks and clear guidance that mobile assets do not imply mobile runtime support.

One distinct asset-inventory Markdown resource is registered in the document map; README and START_HERE changes are compact, no broad brand document or durable decision is added, and the ratcheted 56-file/1,213,000-byte budgets remain green.

verification.evidence: The exact thirty-path icon integration plus five-path Planning bind passes docs, decisions, UI, independent review, TRC-001 through TRC-005, CON-001 through CON-004, dependencies, fixtures, boundaries, no telemetry, source artifacts, LEN-001 through LEN-005 and all five documentation-quality dimensions.

verification.command: UI Design exact-hash packaged visual review
verification.evidence: UI Design matched full-index SHA-256 1d1201745499ed45df6c8053a6c7f2bb53fdd17497ebcd09af0f6e9b19ab5c1, asset aggregate f48feba876d54e0a4e8253f189e6c84490877a01f2f45e167eb1c5776d182ca3 and packaged/source ICNS identity 3bd6cf05756148f560c0c6c20d95d5db24f13c3fab293f2bb82601f8f43e7a53, then returned ACCEPTED/CLEAR from real Finder evidence.

verification.command: npm run verify:contracts && npm run verify:traceability && npm run verify:ui-visual
verification.evidence: The candidate retains CON-001 through CON-004, semantic lock v3 with 1,184 claims, the existing UI visual contract and every Requirement, Exit, phase and acceptance status without drift.
LEN-001 through LEN-005 pass with 56 Markdown files, 3,466 of 3,700 entry words, 4,577 trace lines, 249,904 of 250,000 trace bytes and 1,212,614 of 1,213,000 governed Markdown bytes.

coordination.taskTitle: Approved Pige app icon desktop integration
coordination.compatibility: This candidate introduces the user-approved Pige mark on the repository introduction and desktop package resources. It preserves product claims and every status, leaves platform mask treatment to each OS, and treats iOS/Android files as future-ready exports rather than mobile implementation evidence.
coordination.acknowledgement: UI Design supplied the approved assets and exact-hash packaged visual acceptance. Development bound the desktop builder and Windows inventory test. Product Planning added only the README introduction, task router, document-map/leanness registration and current-only recipe without altering the frozen thirty-path candidate.

nonBlockingRisks: Finder evidence covers the reviewed macOS packaged presentation; exact Windows ICO frames are contract-tested, while broader installed Windows visual evidence remains part of the existing platform matrix.
iOS and Android exports are future-ready source assets only; no mobile runtime, project, store listing or release support is claimed.
Signing, notarization, hardened runtime, store metadata and manual signed installed-platform evidence remain open under the existing release contract.
Platform-owned masks and adaptive-icon treatment can change final silhouette presentation without changing the approved core mark.
The repository-relative README image depends on Git hosting support for PNG rendering; accessible alt text preserves a concise textual identity when images are unavailable.
